releases.name: v1.8.1 Hot Fix
releases.body:
### DDNet 19.9.0--

# Bug Fixes

- Fixed weird bug where selecting Text in chat wouldn't align with what's shown in chat

releases.name: v1.8
releases.body:
### DDNet 19.9.0--

# Changes

- Add Process priority settings, allows setting ddnet priority higher and discords lower (should fix lag when in call)
- Improved gores mode
- Improved chai script performance a bit
- Added translate from TClient
- Added scrolling to chat
- Added ability to select and copy content from chat directly
- Added the abilty to change moving tiles design mode

# Bug Fixes

- Fixed invalid weapon crash
- Fixed warlist info in server browser, it now always updated correctly

releases.name: v1.7.1
releases.body:
### DDNet 19.8.0

# Bug Fixes

- Fixed some Fast Input issues
- Fixed "invalid weapon" crash

releases.name: v1.7
releases.body:
### DDNet 19.8.0

# Changes

- Added option to show moving tiles in entity view (ec_show_moving_tiles_entities)
- Added physics balls (physic_ball_new)
- Added Map Overview to menu
- Added Frozen Tee Hud to menu
- Added Warlist integration to Frozen Tee Hud
- Added option to render all feet as white feet (ec_white_feet)
- Added option to render frozen tees with colored body (ec_color_frozen_tee_body)
- Added Warlist Prefixes to server info in server browser
- Added ".antiad" default chat command -> sends a randomized entityclient.net advertisement to use against bot ads
- Removed ec_list_warlist_info, can be done with chai script

# Bug Fixes

- A bunch of Fast Input & Anitping smootihng fixes from TClient
- Some Mumble fixes from TClient
- Fixed steam integration, I think?

releases.name: v1.6.1
releases.body:
### DDNet 19.8.0-

# Bug Fixes

- Fast Input fixes
- Properly send fast input to servers
- Fix leaving team on kill

releases.name: v1.6.0
releases.body:
### DDNet 19.8.0-

# Changes

- Add help text in quick actions
- Added map overview (ec_map_overview)
- Added Volleyball with custom rendering from TClient
- Added adjustable fast input from TClient
- Added Tee Trails from TClient with improved alpha fading
- Added Custom Flags from TClient and added entity flag
- Properly load custom communites on client start
- Increased Discord rpc status buffer size
- Added option to outline team colors in scoreboard (ec_scoreboard_outline_teams)
- Added option to revert ddnet hook line changes (ec_revert_hook_line)

# Bug Fixes

- Fixed Gores Mode key reader crash
- Fixed Chat Bubbles empty textcontainer crash
- Fixed anti spawn block again
- Fixed being able to have an empty name

#
Report Bugs to me!

releases.name: v1.5.1
releases.body:
### DDNet 19.7.0

# Changes

- Added Chai Script from TClient
- allow as low as -10 for cl_nameplates_offset
- Improved Anti Ping smooting -> players don't 'randomly' teleport anymore
- removed perma_password (can be done with chaiscript)
- You can now drag and drop wartypes in the warlist settings menu
- Added option to render weapons while frozen (ec_render_weapons_in_freeze)

# Bug Fixes

- Close Scrollregions if theyre outside of another scrollregion (e.g Effect selector in visuals tab)
- Fixed entries getting removed if temp entry gets added on same name
- Fixed Gores Mode if toggled from the menu
- Fixed Chat command cache not updating when adding new bindchat command
- Fixed onlineinfo displaying the wrong afk amount sometimes
- Fixed some auto add on name change issues

#
Report Bugs to me!

releases.name: v1.5.0
releases.body:
### DDNet 19.6.0

# Changes

- Added default quick actions bind
- Added Client version to console
- Added say_queued which respects the normal chat queue
- Added Custom Communities from [TClient](https://github.com/TaterClient/TClient)
- Added Background Draw from [TClient](https://github.com/TaterClient/TClient)
- Moved Muted Icon in scoreboard to the end of the players name
- Added some custom stuff for my servers (might be more coming)
- Refactored `onlineinfo`
- Refactored Freeze Kill

# Bug Fixes

- Fixed Quickactions on blockworlds
- Fixed Bindchat crash
- Fixed Button Overlap on different Resolutions
- Fixed Server-Side Rainbow sliders

#
Report Bugs to me!

releases.name: v1.4.1
releases.body:
### DDNet 19.5.0

# Changes

- Added Fallback url for info fetching
- Added config for friend colors in chat (ec_chat_friend_color)
- When hovering a wartype in the menu it now shows the amount of entries for that type

# Bug Fixes

- Fixed issue where quick actions would switch targets while its still open
- Fixed chat autocompletion bug

#
Report Bugs to me!

releases.name: v1.4.0
releases.body:
### DDNet 19.4.0

# Changes

- Added news page where I can write whatever the flicking flack i want in :>
- Added online player list for warlist players (like the friends list in the server browser)
- Added quick actions
- Added gores mode key reader to the settings menu
- Added emoji support
- Added freeze katana
- Added option to revert team colors (ec_revert_team_colors 1)
- Added options for friend colors (ec_nameplate_friendcolor, ec_scoreboard_friendcolor)
- Added remove_entry_name and remove_entry_clan - removes any entry with that name
- Made cursor render in spec even if hud is turned off
- Improved notify on move -> now checks if player has been bumped, hooked and hammered instead of just comparing last and new positions (tabbing out while falling doesnt notify anymore)
- Individual outline width for every type
- Moved chat bubbles to visual settings
- Stole status bar from T-Client
- Stole wheel animations from T-Client (ec_animate_wheel_time)
- Stole T-Client outline update - now works with front layer aswell

# Bug Fixes

- Fixed buggy freezekill rendering
- Fixed weird gores mode behavior when its not on mouse1
- Fixed FPS drop when receiving a new snapshot
- Fixed chat bubbles storing messages while offline
- Fixed chat bubbles still popping up if a player is muted
- Fixed some buttons not working in the menu

#
Report Bugs to me!
